## Checklist

- [ ] My changes follow the style described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If I touched a format file or example, every code block fits the format's width budget
- [ ] If I added a new format, I also added an example, a width-budget entry, optional narrative-arc entry, and SKILL.md routing wiring
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, credentials, or personal data
